texto: Life can sometime be very hard for us and we feel that as if we are drowning in our problems. when we feel this way we only need to look up and see that there is a hand reaching out to save us.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Pastor David Smith: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “Life can sometime be very hard for us and we feel that as if we are drowning in our problems. whe…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, jesus-christ, sometime pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
